---
title: "Main Analysis"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
# knitr::opts_chunk$set(
#   echo       = FALSE,   # hide code in paper output
#   warning    = FALSE,
#   message    = FALSE,
#   fig.width  = 7,
#   fig.height = 4.5,
#   fig.retina = 3,       # crisp figures on retina displays
#   dpi        = 300      # print-quality
# )
```

```{r}
# =============================================================================
# Main Analysis: Personalized Pre-Session Preparation
# N-of-1 Crossover Trial | Maya Care and Grow, Agartala
# PI: Martin Braquet | Collaborator: Riki Dewan
# =============================================================================
#
# STRUCTURE
#   0.  Packages & parallel backend
#   1.  Blocked randomisation (block size = 4, no consecutive repeats)
#   2.  Data loading
#   3.  Model fitting
#   4.  Stopping criteria (per child)
#   5.  Reporting & plots
#
# =============================================================================

library(tidyverse)
library(tibble)
library(tidyr)
library(brms)
library(MASS)
library(furrr)
library(cmdstanr)
library(scales)
library(dplyr)
library(purrr)
library(ggplot2)

source(here::here("analysis", "utils", "model.R"))
source(here::here("analysis", "utils", "sim.R"))
source(here::here("analysis", "utils", "plotting.R"))
source(here::here("analysis", "utils", "power.R"))
source(here::here("analysis", "utils", "stop_criteria.R"))

set.seed(42)
```

```{r}
file_path <- here("data", "study_data.csv")
study_data <- read_csv(file_path)

study_data <- study_data %>%
  mutate(
    baseline_state = factor(baseline_state, levels = c("tired", "neutral", "hyper")),
    prep = factor(prep, levels = c("No Prep", "Calming", "Stimulating", "Child Choice")),
    child_id = as.factor(child_id)
  )
study_data
```

```{r}
chains <- 4
fit <- fit_model_fresh(
  study_data,
  threads = threading(chains),
  chains = chains,
  iter = 2000
)
summary(fit)
```

```{r}
chains <- 4
results <- check_stopping_sequentially(
  template_fit = fit,
  data = study_data,
  min_sessions = 0
)
child_status <- results$child_status
child_status
```
